basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the provided data. Relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks for SC/ST candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st class M.Sc. in Physics with Qualified CSIR/UGC-JRF/NET
qualification.details: 1st class M.Sc. in Physics with Qualified CSIR/UGC-JRF/NET. Candidates with some research experience in theoretical condensed matter physics and familiarity with computer programming will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE may be relaxed for CFTI graduates with CGPA >8.000.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: 1st class M.Sc. in Physics with Qualified CSIR/UGC-JRF/NET. Candidates with some research experience in theoretical condensed matter physics and familiarity with computer programming will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE may be relaxed for CFTI graduates with CGPA >8.000.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: No specific age limit is mentioned in the provided data. Relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks for SC/ST candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st class M.Sc. in Physics and have qualified in the CSIR/UGC-JRF/NET examination. Research experience in theoretical condensed matter physics is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow recruitment at IIT Delhi is IITD/IRD/160/2026.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, IIT Delhi offers a 5% relaxation of marks for SC/ST candidates in their academic qualifications.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow position announced by IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
